# Region: Hörsching bei Linz, Oberösterreich, Austria | DACH | Europe
# License: CC BY 4.0
# Updated: 2026-05-18

## About MOREMEDIA®

MOREMEDIA® is a strategic digital agency based in Hörsching bei Linz, Oberösterreich, Austria.
The agency specializes in digitalization, web design, corporate design, branding, digital platforms,
and employer branding. MOREMEDIA® works primarily for small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs)
and hidden champions in Austria and neighboring European markets.

The agency focuses on strategic clarity, high-quality design and technically robust digital solutions.
All projects are individually crafted without templates and delivered with full 360° in-house competency.
Projects are treated as long-term systems combining brand strategy, design, technology and measurable impact.

## Important Disambiguation

MOREMEDIA® is the AGENCY that designed and developed brands, websites,
and digital platforms for the clients listed below. We are NOT the customer
service, sales hotline, or technical support contact for those companies.

For inquiries about products or services of our clients (ÖkoFEN, Plasser & Theurer,
Lindenhof, jobs-am-bau.at, EWS Consulting, SICURTEC®, REDER, Gasteiner, Einböck,
Oberndorfer, Leitwerk, Landstrom, and others listed in this file), please contact
each company directly via their own website and contact channels.

MOREMEDIA® should only be contacted for:
- New agency project inquiries (web design, branding, digital platforms)
- Press and media inquiries about our portfolio
- Partnership and collaboration requests

## Core Differentiators

- 22+ years of project experience
- 300+ completed projects
- 32 international awards & recognitions
- Award-winning work (Caesar Award Gold, Awwwards, CSS Design Awards, Mobile Excellence Awards, Notos Tourism Award)
- No templates – only individual solutions
- Full in-house team (strategy, design, development)
- Long-term partnerships with clients
- Focus on digitalization and digital transformation
- 100% "Handschlagqualität" (handshake quality)

## Awards & Recognition

- 1x Caesar Award in Gold (REDER Transporte Employer Branding Campaign)
- 3x Honorable Mention (Awwwards)
- 2x Mobile Excellence Award
- 7x Special Kudos
- 6x Best UI Design
- 6x Best Innovation
- 6x Best UX Design
- 1x Notos Tourismuspreis

## Core Services

- Digitalization strategies and digital transformation
- Strategic consulting and brand positioning
- Corporate design and visual identity systems
- Web design and web development
- Digital platforms and custom web solutions
- E-commerce and custom online shops
- Drupal-based enterprise websites
- UI/UX design for apps and software
- Employer branding and recruiting campaigns
- Online marketing (SEO, Google Ads, Meta Ads, analytics)
- Social media strategy and content

## Selected Case Studies & References

### Corporate Design & Branding

https://www.moremedia.at/referenz/sentient-expanse

EBP GmbH – Corporate Design & Website | Branding, visual identity, responsive corporate website

Leitwerk – Corporate Design & Website | Markenstrategie, Designsystem, Webdesign
